evals.prompt: The app shows a white screen after adding a new component that imports ioredis
evals.expected_output: Identifies ioredis as a server-only import that cannot be used in browser code, removes or guards the import

assertions.name: identifies-server-import
assertions.description: Correctly identifies ioredis as the root cause (server-only module in browser code)

assertions.name: runs-build
assertions.description: Runs npm run build to capture the actual error output

assertions.name: searches-for-pattern
assertions.description: Searches src/ for ioredis imports to find all occurrences

assertions.name: verifies-fix
assertions.description: Runs build again after fix to confirm it passes

evals.prompt: Build is failing with CSS errors in index.css
evals.expected_output: Checks @import order in index.css — Google Fonts @import must come before @tailwind directives

assertions.name: checks-import-order
assertions.description: Checks that @import statements come before @tailwind directives in index.css

assertions.name: runs-tsc
assertions.description: Runs npx tsc --noEmit for type errors as part of diagnosis

assertions.name: targeted-fix
assertions.description: Applies a targeted fix rather than rewriting the entire file

evals.prompt: Getting 'process is not defined' error in the browser console
evals.expected_output: Finds process.env usage in src/ and replaces with import.meta.env.VITE_*

assertions.name: searches-process-env
assertions.description: Searches for process.env in src/ to find offending code

assertions.name: checks-hmr-overlay
assertions.description: Notes that HMR overlay is enabled so errors show as red overlay in browser

evals.prompt: TypeScript errors after pulling latest changes, app won't compile
evals.expected_output: Runs npx tsc --noEmit, identifies specific type errors, fixes them without masking with 'any'

assertions.name: runs-tsc-first
assertions.description: Runs npx tsc --noEmit as the first diagnostic step

assertions.name: no-any-escape
assertions.description: Does not resolve type errors by casting to 'any' or using @ts-ignore

assertions.name: build-verified
assertions.description: Runs npm run build after fix to confirm compilation succeeds
